title: hieracium subramosum subsp. amphiastum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. amphiastum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly known as Hawkweed or Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. amphiastum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
